aws.cloudtrail.multi_region_enabled.notes: flow_logs_enabled covers logging, but multi-region specifically needs trail configured in all regions - may need additional check

aws.cloudtrail.cloudwatch_logging_enable.notes: flow_logs_enabled covers CloudWatch Logs integration for CloudTrail

aws.cloudtrail.log_file_validation_enabl.notes: Specific check for log file integrity validation - not covered by general flow_logs

aws.cloudtrail.kms_encryption_enabled.notes: logs_centralized_and_encrypted covers KMS encryption for CloudTrail logs

aws.cloudtrail.s3_dataevents_read_enable.notes: flow_logs covers event logging, but S3 data events require specific event selector configuration

aws.cloudtrail.s3_dataevents_write_enabl.notes: flow_logs covers event logging, but S3 data events require specific event selector configuration

aws.cloudtrail.bucket.access_logging_ena.notes: flow_logs_enabled covers S3 bucket access logging for CloudTrail bucket

aws.cloudtrail.bucket.is_not_publicly_ac.notes: S3 bucket public access check - should be S3 service function, not CloudTrail

aws.cloudtrail.threat_detection_enumerat.notes: Threat detection analysis - requires log analysis, not configuration check

aws.cloudtrail.threat_detection_privileg.notes: Threat detection analysis - requires log analysis for privilege escalation patterns

aws.cloudtrail.threat_detection_llm_jack.notes: Threat detection for LLM attacks - requires log analysis, modern threat pattern

aws.cloudtrail.unauthorized_api_calls_mo.notes: alerts_for_anomalies covers unauthorized API call monitoring

aws.cloudtrail.vpc_changes_monitoring_en.notes: flow_logs_enabled covers VPC change monitoring through CloudTrail

expert_mapping._comment_remaining: Other CloudTrail compliance functions need individual analysis with CSV reference

key_insight: Following user guidance: audit/logging compliance functions map to cloudtrail.trail.flow_logs_enabled
